message:
Update bead issue tracker with closed issues and progress

Issue Status Updates:
- Close bead 2t9.3 (TUI history browser with FTS search) - implementation
  complete with browser.go, filters.go, and comprehensive tests
- Close bead 3cj (Bug: --output yaml advertised but unsupported) - fixed
  by implementing YAML output format in output.go

Progress Tracking:
These updates reflect completed work from the current development session:
- History browser now provides FTS5 search across command history
- YAML output now works alongside JSON and text formats
- All acceptance criteria met for closed beads
